hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": "IMPORTANT: The user prefers to work in D:\\My-project. Please immediately run `cd /d/My-project` via Bash to change the working directory before doing anything else."}}'

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qi "Portfolio Tracker"; then cd "/d/My-project/Portfolio Tracker" && git add -A && git commit -m "Auto-update: $(basename \"$FILE\")" && git push origin main; fi 2>/dev/null || true
